notes:
Rooms and Team Admin Fixes

  • Team admins can edit and delete rooms again. Save and Delete in the room editor now work for admins on every room in their team, not just on rooms they actively joined.
  • Full emoji support in room icons. You can now pick the Czech flag, family emoji, and skin-tone emoji as a room icon — no more silent truncation.
  • Cleaner icon picker. The icon field in Create/Edit Room now looks and behaves like a picker button instead of a text field.
  • Tighter team write permissions. Only team admins can rename or change the logo of a team. Other users no longer have the ability to modify a team's metadata.
